title: Jobify
overview: A streamlined job application tracker with AI-powered autofill and smart analytics.
description: Jobify is a job application tracker built to simplify and centralize your job hunt. With a clean dashboard, users can manage all their job applications in one place. Its standout feature is an AI-powered autofill system using the Gemini API just paste a job posting link, and Jobify extracts key details for you. Built with Next.js, Supabase, and TailwindCSS, the platform offers secure authentication via Google and a fast, responsive UI with DaisyUI components. Future updates will introduce job search analytics to help users track their progress and optimize applications. Whether you're job hunting casually or full-time, Jobify makes the process efficient and stress-free.

title: Unify
overview: An events creation and sharing platform aimed at simplifying university life.
description: Unify is a cutting-edge events & time management platform designed to streamline university life. It enables societies and venues to share events to their users with minimal hassle. With an intuitive interface Unify allows uni students to focus on things that matter, not just juggling their social life. The platform provides robust security features to protect sensitive data. Whether you're working in a small club or a large society, Unify helps bring everything together on one unified platform.

title: Tetris AI
overview: An online multiplayer Tetris game, with an AI opponent trained to play at varying levels of difficulty using machine learning.
description: Tetris AI is an AI-driven version of the classic Tetris game that showcases advanced artificial intelligence techniques to autonomously play and excel at Tetris. Utilizing Python and Pygame, the AI is programmed with strategies to optimize block placements, clear lines efficiently, and achieve high scores. The game features various levels of difficulty where the AI learns from each iteration, improving its performance over time. This project not only provides entertainment but also serves as an example of practical AI application in gaming, offering insights into AI algorithms, machine learning concepts, and game development.

title: Prosthetic Hand
overview: A low-cost 3D-printed prosthetic that mimics a person's hand using a camera and googles media-pipe library.
description: The Prosthetic Hand project is a revolutionary prototype aimed at improving the lives of individuals with limb loss. This cutting-edge design leverages Python for gesture recognition via the MediaPipe API, combined with Arduino for precise motor control. The prosthetic hand responds to user inputs in real time, enabling natural and intuitive movements. Developed using 3D-printed components and CAD design, the hand is lightweight, durable, and affordable compared to traditional prosthetics. By integrating advanced algorithms and machine learning, it offers personalized movement patterns and can adapt to the user's unique needs, marking a significant step forward in assistive technology.
